 0014: # Portable LSB via inline C — uses MSVC _BitScanForward64 or GCC __builtin_ctzll
 0015: cdef extern from *:
 0016:     """
 0017:     #ifdef _MSC_VER
 0018:     #include <intrin.h>
 0019:     static __forceinline int _cy_lsb_impl(unsigned long long bb) {
 0020:         if (!bb) return -1;
 0021:         unsigned long idx;
 0022:         _BitScanForward64(&idx, bb);
 0023:         return (int)idx;
 0024:     }
 0025:     #if defined(_M_AMD64) || defined(_M_ARM64)
 0026:     static __forceinline int _cy_popcount_impl(unsigned long long bb) {
 0027:         return (int)__popcnt64(bb);
 0028:     }
 0029:     #else
 0030:     static __forceinline int _cy_popcount_impl(unsigned long long bb) {
 0031:         bb = bb - ((bb >> 1) & 0x5555555555555555ULL);
 0032:         bb = (bb & 0x3333333333333333ULL) + ((bb >> 2) & 0x3333333333333333ULL);
 0033:         return (int)((((bb + (bb >> 4)) & 0xF0F0F0F0F0F0F0FULL) * 0x101010101010101ULL) >> 56);
 0034:     }
 0035:     #endif
 0036:     #else
 0037:     static __inline__ int _cy_lsb_impl(unsigned long long bb) {
 0038:         if (!bb) return -1;
 0039:         return __builtin_ctzll(bb);
 0040:     }
 0041:     static __inline__ int _cy_popcount_impl(unsigned long long bb) {
 0042:         return __builtin_popcountll(bb);
 0043:     }
 0044:     #endif
 0045:     """
 0046:     int _cy_lsb_impl(unsigned long long bb) nogil
 0047:     int _cy_popcount_impl(unsigned long long bb) nogil

 0817: # ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
 0818: # CGameState — C struct for O(1) stack-based make/unmake history
 0819: #
 0820: # Stores board snapshots entirely in stack-allocated C memory.
 0821: # No Python allocator involvement, no reference counting, no GIL for copy.
 0822: # ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
 0823: cdef struct CGameState:
 0824:     unsigned long long bitboards[12]   # piece bitboards (white P..K, black p..k)
 0825:     unsigned long long occupancies[3]  # [WHITE, BLACK, BOTH]
 0826:     int side_to_move
 0827:     int castling_rights
 0828:     int en_passant_sq
 0829:     int halfmove_clock
 0830:     int fullmove_number
 0831:     int piece_map[64]                  # piece index per square; -1 = empty
 0832:     unsigned long long zobrist_key
 0833: 
 0834: 
 0835: # ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
 0836: # Helper: copy CGameState fields to/from CustomBitboardBoard
 0837: # ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
